title: Ores Drop Op loot datapack
description: this datapack changes the loot table of ores and drop op items based on the rarity of ore
body:
рҹ’Һ About:

Every ore in Minecraft drops custom OP items!
From Coal to Ancient Debris, each ore has unique themed loot вҖ” gear, potions, totems, even memes.


рҹ§ұ List of Ore Themes:

рҹӘЁ Coal вҖ“ Starter OP lootвҡҷпёҸ 
Iron вҖ“ Diamond gear & XPрҹ’°
Gold вҖ“ God loot + beaconрҹ’Һ 
Diamond вҖ“ Full OP dropsрҹ”®
Lapis вҖ“ PotionsвҡЎ
Redstone вҖ“ Explosive techрҹӘҷ 
Copper вҖ“ BuilderвҖҷs gear
рҹ’ҡ Emerald вҖ“ Villager treasure
рҹ”Ҙ Quartz вҖ“ Nether energy
рҹ’Җ Ancient Debris вҖ“ Endgame god-tier


рҹ’Ў Version: 1.19 - 1.19.3

вҡҷпёҸ Pack format: 10

рҹ“Ұ Compatibility: Works in singleplayer + multiplayer

рҹҺҜ Made by: Modular Boy Ansh

рҹ§Ё How to install:
1пёҸвғЈ Download the ZIP
2пёҸвғЈ Put it in world/datapacks/
3пёҸвғЈ Run /reload
4пёҸвғЈ Start mining ores and get OP loot!
